falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 Index closes above 5,200 (200-day moving average) by Day 14
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above the key long-term trendline would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern and suggest a resumption of the prior uptrend, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield drops below 3.8% and remains there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a pronounced and sustained decline in yields would indicate strong risk-on sentiment and economic optimism, directly contradicting the blowoff score's implication of near-term volatility or topping action.

falsification_conditions.condition: Bitcoin price surges 30% above its 200-day moving average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp altcoin rally would signal a shift in risk appetite and market structure, invalidating the 'unknown' phase by confirming a clear directional move contrary to the bottom pattern's expectations.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
